overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Unreal Engine 5 game showing a character exploring a fantastical canyon with vibrant green mineral terraces and red pools. The character walks through tall grass and along precarious rock formations, revealing distant sci-fi structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy canyon floor between tall rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass between steep canyon walls

entered.detail: tall layered rock wall with mossy patches and vegetation
steep rock face with sparse shrubs
dense green grass covering the canyon floor
large layered rock pillars visible through the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow canyon passage with dense tall grass between steep rock walls. The path leads toward distant rock formations visible ahead, creating a sense of exploration in a natural environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced mineral pools with vibrant green bacterial mats

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to vibrant green mineral terraces

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow green mineral terraces above a deep red water channel

entered.detail: stepped rock formations covered in bright green mineral deposits and pools
deep channel with striking red-colored water flowing alongside the path
small waterfall cascading down the rock face into the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto vibrant green mineral terraces that replace the grassy floor. A striking red water pool runs alongside the path on the right, with a small waterfall visible ahead in the narrowing canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon vista point overlooking sci-fi ruins and tower

events.description: character stops at the canyon edge to observe the view ahead
character turns around 180 degrees to walk back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: pausing at the end of the path to look into the canyon depths, then turning around and walking back toward the camera

entered.detail: tall white cylindrical sci-fi structure with external scaffolding and platforms
complex of futuristic buildings and industrial platforms integrated with the rock formations
simple wooden footbridge spanning the red water channel

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the terrace path and stops to observe the deep canyon ahead. After a moment, they turn around, revealing a stunning vista of a large white tower and sci-fi ruins in the distance, then walk back along the green terraces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow canyon that transforms from a wild, grassy passage into a surreal landscape of mineral terraces and distant sci-fi ruins. It begins with the character navigating a tight corridor of steep rock walls and dense tall grass, moving steadily toward distant formations. As the terrain shifts, the grassy floor gives way to vibrant green mineral terraces accompanied by a striking red water pool and a small waterfall ahead. The scene then reaches a precipice overlooking a deep canyon before the camera pivots, revealing a stunning vista of a large white tower and futuristic ruins in the distance. Finally, the character turns back to walk along the vivid green terraces, retreating from the overlook toward the canyon interior.
